summary: Tested unmocked features: Coach Watch Alert, School Social Links, and Stripe Checkout. All 3 features are working correctly with real backend implementations. Backend tests: 12/12 passed. Frontend verification: All Journey page elements verified.

minor.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error instead of 404 for invalid session

critical_code_review_comments: Coach Watch alert endpoint requires exact university_name match - 'Stanford University' works but 'Stanford' returns null. Frontend correctly uses program.university_name which is the full name.
Stripe checkout creates real test sessions that redirect to checkout.stripe.com
Social links are properly enriched from university_knowledge_base during program fetch
context_for_next_testing_agent: All unmocked features verified working: (1) Coach Watch Alert shows dynamic status from API with color-coded severity - Stanford shows 'Staff Stable' green badge with real data from coach_watch_alerts collection. (2) School Social Links - Stanford has instagram, twitter, facebook, youtube URLs from university_knowledge_base. (3) Stripe Checkout creates real sessions via emergentintegrations library - returns checkout.stripe.com URLs. Settings page handles ?session_id=X&upgrade=success redirect.

coach_watch_alert.data: Returns real alert data with status, severity, change_type, recommendation

stripe_checkout.returns: Real Stripe checkout URL with session_id
